name: You are Peter Shorts
short_description: You are PETER SHORTS! You have been captured and taken to a secret cloning facility. Can you escape with your newly-cloned brethren?
detailed_description:
You are PETER SHORTS!

Grilling on a Saturday afternoon, Peter is ambushed and captured by a top-secret agency, who seek to use his DNA for cloning experiments. Can you help Peter (and his newly-cloned brethren) escape?

THE MAIN ADVENTURE

  • EXPLORE the facility in this Metroidvania beat-em-up hybrid
  • Find and K.O. rogue PETER CLONES, and let BUG take them to safety
  • P2 can join as BUG, who can drop egg-bombs and capture enemies
  • TRANSFORM after defeating BOSS PETERS
  • Take down the MAD SCIENTIST who took Peter from his grill!

FEATURES

  • A multiplayer VS Mode with 25 playable Peters
  • A built-in randomizer (unlocked after collecting all diskettes)
  • Simple 2-button controls with fighting game mechanics, including a GUARD, PARRY, and AIR DODGE
  • A vibrant 2A03+FDS chiptune soundtrack
